tools.name: search_tracks
tools.description: Search Spotify for tracks by title or artist name.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get track recommendations based on an artist, track title, or genre.

tools.name: get_recent_tracks
tools.description: Get the user's recently played tracks from Spotify (requires Premium).

tools.name: get_liked_tracks
tools.description: Get all tracks saved in the user's Spotify library.

tools.name: like_track
tools.description: Save a track to the user's Spotify library.

tools.name: unlike_track
tools.description: Remove a track from the user's Spotify library.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Spotify profile: display name, email, plan.

tools.name: get_playlists
tools.description: Get all playlists owned or followed by the authenticated Spotify user.

tools.name: get_playlist_tracks
tools.description: Get all tracks in a specific Spotify playlist by its ID.

tools.name: create_playlist
tools.description: Create a new playlist on the user's Spotify account.

tools.name: add_track_to_playlist
tools.description: Add a track to an existing Spotify playlist.

tools.name: remove_track_from_playlist
tools.description: Remove a track from a Spotify playlist.

tools.name: play_track
tools.description: Get track metadata and trigger playback.

tools.name: play_track_by_name
tools.description: Search for a track by title and artist name, then play it.

tools.name: play_playlist
tools.description: Play all tracks in a Spotify playlist sequentially.

tools.name: pause_playback
tools.description: Pause playback on the user's active Spotify device.

tools.name: resume_playback
tools.description: Resume playback on the user's active Spotify device.

tools.name: next_track
tools.description: Skip to the next track on the user's active Spotify device.

tools.name: previous_track
tools.description: Skip to the previous track on the user's active Spotify device.

tools.name: panel_search_tracks
tools.description: Search Spotify tracks and show results in the sidebar panel.

tools.name: open_playlist
tools.description: Open a playlist's tracks in the right detail panel.

tools.name: open_liked_tracks
tools.description: Open liked/saved tracks in the right detail panel.

tools.name: open_recent_tracks
tools.description: Open recently played tracks in the right detail panel.

tools.name: open_profile
tools.description: Open the user's Spotify profile in the right detail panel.

tools.name: connect_spotify
tools.description: Connect your Spotify account via OAuth 2.0. Returns an authorisation URL.

tools.name: disconnect_spotify
tools.description: Disconnect your Spotify account and remove all stored credentials.

tools.name: __webhook__/oauth/callback
tools.description: Webhook handler for path: /oauth/callback

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_spotify_stats
tools.description: Spotify library stats: liked track count and playlist count for classifier

tools.name: __panel__spotify
tools.description: Panel: Spotify

tools.name: __panel__spotify_detail
tools.description: Panel: Spotify

name: Spotify
description: Full access to your Spotify music library. Search tracks, manage playlists, save songs, view play history, and connect via OAuth 2.0.
author: Imperal
